title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!
